search_manifest.seed_order: 1-byte seeds first, then 2-byte seeds, each bucket big-endian
search_manifest.match_rule: generated seed prefixes are compared directly against transformed bytes
search_manifest.metadata_policy: each transform row carries an estimated metadata byte cost before promotion
search_manifest.scope: record/context-aware transform research artifact only; not .tlmr format support

corpora.name: json
corpora.note: Generated JSON corpus from the main structured matrix.

corpora.name: csv
corpora.note: CSV corpus with repeated field positions.

corpora.name: log
corpora.note: Line-oriented log corpus with repeated context fields.

corpora.name: yaml
corpora.note: YAML corpus with indentation and colon-delimited fields.

corpora.name: toml
corpora.note: TOML corpus with repeated key/value record shape.

corpora.name: binary-tlv
corpora.note: Binary TLV control where text delimiter transforms should not overfit.
